readme_title: Healora MVP Synthetic Profile Test Pack
purpose: README for 10 synthetic Digital Twin profiles used to test Healora MVP recommendations.
important_note: All profiles are synthetic and for MVP testing only. The output should not be medical diagnosis.

mvp_logic.input: A Digital Twin profile with demographics, body measurements, vitals, labs, lifestyle, genetics, medical history, health risk score, health literacy score, stars, progress and goals.
mvp_logic.processing: Interpret risk signals, match suitable interventions, adapt recommendation language using health literacy, and generate daily micro-tasks.
mvp_logic.output: Russian daily plan with 5 tasks, categories, stars, reasons, tracked outcomes, safety notes, and progress update.

health_risk_score_0_100.meaning: Prototype cardiometabolic/autonomic risk priority score, not diagnosis.

health_literacy_score_0_100.meaning: Controls explanation depth, task difficulty, terminology and content type.

field_definitions.vitals: blood pressure, resting heart rate, HRV, SpO2.
field_definitions.prototype_experiment: sit-to-stand/step-test data: peak HR, recovery HR, HRR60, HRR120, repetitions.
field_definitions.labs: glucose, HbA1c, cholesterol, HDL, LDL, triglycerides, CRP, vitamin D, ferritin, TSH.
field_definitions.lifestyle: smoking, alcohol, activity, steps, sleep, stress, diet, water, screen time, work schedule.
field_definitions.genetics: APOE, MTHFR, lactase, BRCA, Factor V Leiden, FTO if available.
field_definitions.medical_history: disease status, medications, allergies, family history.
field_definitions.digital_twin_scores: health risk, literacy score, stars, progress, streak and journey phase.
field_definitions.expected_mvp_behavior: Main recommendation focus and writing style.
field_definitions.avoid_or_safety_notes: Things the MVP should avoid or phrase safely.

universal_testing_prompt: Read this Digital Twin JSON profile and generate today's Healora plan in Russian. Use biomarkers, lifestyle, goals, health risk score, and health literacy level. Return 5 micro-tasks with category, stars, short reason, tracked outcome, and safety note if needed. Adapt the language difficulty to the health literacy level. Do not provide medical diagnosis. If medical follow-up is appropriate, phrase it as a recommendation to consult a specialist.
